title: columns with not full loaded stats may display wrong column ID in EXPLAIN
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3(x int, y varchar(255), z timestamp, PRIMARY KEY(x), UNIQUE(y));
CREATE TABLE t4(a int, b double, c varchar, INDEX idx_b(b));
SELECT * FROM t3 JOIN t4 ON t3.x = t4.a WHERE t3.y IS NULL OR t4.b > 2.0;
key_bug_features: columns with incomplete stats show wrong column ID
